name: Chocolate Orange Supreme Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, cinnamon, and melted margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese and sugar. Mix until well blended using an electric mixer on medium speed.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Blend in the sour cream and vanilla extract.
6. Blend the melted chocolate chips into three-quarters of the batter.
7. Blend the orange-flavored liqueur and grated orange peel into the remaining batter.
8. Pour the chocolate batter over the crust.
9. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 30 minutes.
10. Reduce the oven temperature to 325 degrees F.
11. Spoon the remaining batter over the chocolate batter and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
12. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan. Cool before removing the rim of the pan.
13. Chill.
